case_title: APOYO FINANCIERO INC. VS. IVAN VALLADARES CRUZ

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY APOYO FINANCIERO INC. AS TO DEFENDANT CRUZ, IVAN VALLADARES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-05-2024 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-05-2024 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO JUN-07-2024 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF APOYO FIANCIERO INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY VERONICA ROSALES. DEFENDANT IVAN VALLADARES CRUS IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAWN PAYNE; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-07-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-07-2024 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY VERONICA ROSALES. DEFENDANT IVAN VALLADARES CRUZ IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF IS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER LAURA OLIMPIA YEDRA IBARRA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: CURTIS SMOLAR; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SC-109 AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $50 SERVED FEB-08-2024, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CRUZ, IVAN VALLADARES

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-07-2024 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CRUZ, IVAN VALLADARES $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,650.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
